news.summary: Blockstream CEO Adam Back believes that despite short-term volatility, Bitcoin has shown resilience amidst geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainty. He notes that Bitcoin has decoupled from traditional markets, having increased five to six times in value since hitting its bottom three years ago. Back predicts strong adoption tailwinds for BTC, including regulatory clarity, institutional interest, and the legitimizing force of ETFs. He mentions that while most long-term holders are fully invested, larger entities like BlackRock and sovereign wealth funds are quietly entering the market. Back also discusses the potential of governments acquiring Bitcoin and suggests that the US government could buy 1 million Bitcoin in the next five years. He remains optimistic about the mid-term outlook despite expected volatility in bull markets. For more insights, watch the full interview on Cointelegraph's YouTube channel.
news.headline: Bitcoin remains resilient amid geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainty, with Blockstream CEO Adam Back noting its 'full decoupling.' BTC has surged five to six times since the market low and shows strong adoption prospects. Back predicts increased institutional interest and regulatory clarity, expecting more entities like BlackRock to enter the market. Despite short-term volatility, he is bullish on the mid-term outlook, foreseeing several 30% drops in a bull market.
More than 150 Chinese citizens have joined the Russian army to fight Ukraine - Ukrainian intelligence report cited by the WSJ.

news.summary: In Ottawa, Ontario, the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) is calling for immediate intervention to halt Israeli military assaults on Palestinian first responders and healthcare staff in Gaza, as well as to cease the continuous genocide. Representing 190,000 healthcare employees, including more than 9,000 paramedics and first responders nationwide, CUPE is urging action. CUPE National President Mark Hancock has personally contacted foreign affairs minister Mélanie Joly regarding the critical circumstances in Gaza. Numerous instances of attacks on healthcare workers have been recorded.
news.headline: CUPE urges protection of Palestinian health workers, criticizes Israeli attacks in Gaza; represents 190,000 workers in Canada.

news.summary: In response to high demand from customers, Linq, the top mobile CRM and lead capture platform globally, has launched an integration with HighLevel marketing service on April 9, 2025. This move comes as a result of the popularity of Linq's innovative iMessaging feature, Linq Blue.
news.headline: Linq integrates with HighLevel due to customer demand for iMessaging feature, Linq Blue. Launches amid market frenzy.

news.summary: A digital intelligence provider, Chetu, based in Sunrise, Florida, is marking its 25th year in operation. The company has achieved a significant milestone by generating a record-breaking $74.54 million in annual revenue.
news.headline: Chetu hits 25th anniversary with $74.54M annual revenue, marking a record-breaking year for the digital intelligence provider.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas on April 9, 2025, Covenant Clearinghouse has reported the resolution of a legal case with Chicago Title Ins. Co. The case, identified as Cause No. 2023CH0224 from the 12th Jud. Dist. in Will County, Illinois, has been successfully concluded. The judge overseeing the case was Bennett Braun.
news.headline: Covenant Clearinghouse wins legal battle against Chicago Title Company in Cause No. 2023CH0224. Judge Braun rules in favor.

news.summary: Ethan Allen's dedication to manufacturing in North America gives them a strategic edge following the imposition of recent tariffs. This focus on local production has enabled the company to navigate the challenges posed by tariffs more effectively. By relying on manufacturing facilities in North America, Ethan Allen has minimized the impact of tariffs on their operations. This commitment underscores their resilience in the face of economic uncertainties and demonstrates the benefits of prioritizing domestic manufacturing. As a result, Ethan Allen has positioned itself favorably in the market, leveraging its North American production capabilities to maintain a competitive stance. This strategy has proven successful, allowing Ethan Allen to sustain its business and uphold its commitment to quality while facing external pressures.
news.headline: Ethan Allen benefits from North American manufacturing post-tariffs, gaining a competitive edge.

news.summary: A legal expert informed Decrypt that combating crypto fraud has become increasingly challenging due to the emergence of schemes that appear too good to be true.
news.headline: City of London Police reports 66% of UK investment fraud involved crypto last year, presenting challenges in combating it.

news.summary: Princeton Partners Group has recently acquired Stackpole, a renowned company, aiming to transform community banking through cutting-edge "Digital First" FinTech upgrades. This merger reflects a strategic move to revolutionize the sector, leveraging modern technology.
news.headline: East Coast agencies unite as Princeton Partners Group acquires Stackpole to modernize community banking with "Digital First" strategy.

news.summary: Confluent, Inc., a data streaming pioneer based in Mountain View, Calif., was awarded the 2025 Google Cloud Partner of the Year award for Data & Analytics - Ingestion. This recognition highlights Confluent's excellence in providing a comprehensive data streaming platform on Google Cloud that facilitates streaming, connectivity, processing, and governance of real-time data in both cloud and hybrid settings. Through their partnership with Google Cloud, Confluent empowers enterprises in various sectors to accelerate insights and decision-making processes. The company's stock is listed as Nasdaq:CFLT.
news.headline: Confluent wins Google Cloud Partner of the Year for the sixth time, particularly for Data & Analytics - Ingestion in 2025.

news.summary: In an announcement made on April 9, 2025, Boom Technologies Ltd. introduced PHOTON, a new initiative aiming to develop decentralised gigawatt-scale AI data centers across Africa. The project calls for a Request for Expression of Interest (RFEI) from African governments. This initiative by Boom signifies a significant effort to establish a robust technological infrastructure on the continent, with the goal of advancing data capabilities and promoting innovation.
news.headline: Boom Technologies Ltd. introduced PHOTON, a Pan-African AI Data Center Initiative aiming for Africa's leadership in AI.

news.summary: An inventor from Leavenworth, Kan., shared his inspiration for creating THE ASSIST, a device aimed at facilitating easier entry and exit from tall trucks. The inventor believed that a safer alternative was needed to mitigate the risk of muscle strains. His design involves elevating the user in a controlled manner. The product is intended to enhance safety and convenience for individuals maneuvering tall trucks.
news.headline: Inventor creates THE ASSIST lift for tall trucks to safely enter/exit, from Leavenworth, Kan. (LBT-4041).

news.summary: Approval has been obtained for the acquisition of Snai, strengthening Flutter's presence in Italy, which is the largest regulated market in Europe. This move solidifies Flutter's position in the region and is set to significantly increase their market share in Italy. Italy's regulated market is a key area of focus for Flutter, and this acquisition will further consolidate their standing in the country. This strategic development marks a significant milestone for Flutter as they continue to expand their operations and strengthen their foothold in key markets.
news.headline: Regulatory approval obtained for Snai acquisition, strengthening Flutter's presence in Italy, Europe's largest regulated market.
US Trade Representative Greer: Agriculture trade with the EU has been fundamentally unfair for decades.

news.summary: A recent report highlighted that in the last fiscal year, government spending on healthcare in the country reached a record high of $500 billion. This marks a significant increase of 10% compared to the previous year. The report also revealed that the number of hospital visits during this period rose by 15%, with a total of 1.5 billion visits recorded. Additionally, the report indicated that the average cost per hospital visit increased by 5%, reaching $350. These findings underscore the growing demand for healthcare services and the escalating costs associated with medical care.
news.headline: IMCO's returns surged by 9.9% in the past year, boosted by investments in stocks and private equity.

news.summary: In Dublin, a new report on the Austria Construction Industry has been released by ResearchAndMarkets.com. This databook covers market size and forecasts by value and volume for more than 40 market segments, including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. The report also provides insights on city-level construction values and construction cost structures. The construction market in Austria is projected to see a 4.0% annual growth, reaching EUR 36.72 billion by 2025.
news.headline: Austria's construction industry to reach EUR 36.72 billion by 2025, growing by 4% annually. Extensive data and forecasts available.

news.summary: Midway through trading, U.S. stocks had mixed performance. The Dow Jones index dropped over 100 points to 37,535.75, a 0.29% decline, while the NASDAQ rose by 0.56% to 15,353.21. The S&P 500 also fell by 0.15% to 4,975.48. Information technology sector saw a surge of 1.8%, whereas energy shares fell by 2% on Wednesday. Simply Good Foods Company (NASDAQ: SMPL) reported strong quarterly results, with second-quarter FY25 sales reaching $359.65 million, a 15% increase year-on-year, surpassing the estimated $354.4 million. Adjusted EPS was 46 cents, beating the consensus of 40 cents. In other news, Venus Concept Inc. (NASDAQ: VERO) experienced a significant increase in share value. Check the full story for more updates.
news.headline: Crude oil drops 4%; Neogen shares plunge post Q3 results. Dow falls over 100 points to 37,535.75, NASDAQ up to 15,353.21, S&P 500 down to 4,975.48. Technology shares climb 1.8%, energy shares fall 2%. Simply Good Foods Company beats estimates with 15% sales growth to $359.65M in Q2 FY25. Adjusted EPS at 46 cents, higher than 40 cents estimate. Venus Concept Inc. shares surge.

news.summary: Constellation Brands, Inc. is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on April 9 after the market closes. Analysts are predicting earnings of $2.28 per share, a slight increase from $2.26 per share during the same period last year. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $2.13 billion, down from $2.14 billion a year ago. E. Yuri Hermida, the Executive Vice President and Chief Growth & Strategy Officer, recently left the company. Constellation Brands' stock price dropped by 0.9% to close at $170.96 on Tuesday. For more details, analyst ratings can be found on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.
news.headline: Constellation Brands to report Q4 earnings on April 9 with estimated $2.28 per share and $2.13 billion revenue. Stock fell 0.9%.

news.summary: A company based in Kihei, Hawaii, operating in geospatial intelligence and space sustainability, recently revealed a significant development on April 9, 2025. Privateer disclosed a noteworthy investment from Far Eastern Group (FEG), a prominent conglomerate in Taiwan. FEG is known as one of the largest and most influential entities in the country. The investment signifies a pivotal moment for Privateer, a company co-founded by Wozniak, with plans to further solidify its presence and operations in the space industry through this strategic partnership.
news.headline: Privateer, a geospatial intel leader, secures investment from Taiwan's FEG, furthering global expansion.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Billingshurst, West Sussex, UK, Energys Group Limited (NASDAQ: ENGS) unveiled plans to acquire a 49% equity stake in Energys Spectrum Limited, based in Hong Kong. This move marks a significant step for Energys Group, a company specializing in energy efficiency and decarbonization solutions for buildings. The non-binding Memorandum of Understanding sets the stage for this strategic investment in the Target Company, enhancing Energys Group's global presence and offerings in the realm of energy-saving technologies and services.
news.headline: Energys Group to acquire 49% of Energy Services Company in Hong Kong. Major step in energy efficiency.

news.summary: The original Immutable X network, which currently operates with a certain number of assets, will be integrated into the newer Immutable zkEVM platform in the near future. This transition will involve an automatic migration of assets from the original network to the newer platform.
news.headline: Immutable will merge its Ethereum gaming networks, with original Immutable X folding into newer Immutable zkEVM; assets will auto-migrate.

news.summary: In Allentown, PA on April 9, 2025, Ted Zeller from Norris McLaughlin, P.A. as well as Ron Jeffries, Shawn Mullen, and members of the NC Beer Community are set to be recognized for their achievements. The Brewers Association (BA), a non-profit trade group advocating for small US craft brewers, will be bestowing these honors.
news.headline: Brewers Association to award Ted Zeller, Ron Jeffries, Shawn Mullen, and NC Beer Community in 2025. ALLENTOWN, Pa., April 9, 2025.

news.summary: In New York, Sei Foundation, an independent entity overseeing the Sei protocol, disclosed the incorporation of USDT0, the unified liquidity network for USDT, onto Sei. Sei is a Layer 1 blockchain amalgamating Ethereum's advantages with Solana's speed. This integration introduces robust, unified stablecoin liquidity to Sei's expanding ecosystem. Users and developers within the Sei Network can now tap into stable and capital-efficient liquidity with this native deployment.
news.headline: USDT0 unified liquidity network integrated on Sei blockchain, combining Ethereum benefits with Solana speed.

news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, Acumatica, a prominent cloud-based business management software provider, announced its recent accolades, confirming its status as a leading player in the ERP market. The company received top rankings in competitive software reports by G2 and was acknowledged in CRN®'s channel program reports. John Case, the CEO of Acumatica, emphasized the significance of feedback from customers, partners, and developers over awards, highlighting the importance of their perception.
news.headline: Acumatica receives top rankings in G2 and CRN reports, solidifying its position as an ERP leader. CEO emphasizes customer satisfaction.

news.summary: Sony Electronics Inc. has recently revealed the enhancement of its ULT POWER SOUND Series as part of the "For The Music" Audio Brand Campaign, in collaboration with music artist Post Malone. The launch took place on April 9, 2025, in San Diego. This partnership aims to immerse listeners with a transformative sound experience, evoking the feeling of being at the forefront of music. Sony's initiative highlights the commitment to providing high-quality audio products.
news.headline: Sony introduces 3 new speakers with Post Malone in ULT POWER SOUND Range, as part of "For The Music" campaign.

news.summary: The latest development in everyday home furnishings was unveiled by Cozey, a prominent North American furniture solutions provider, on April 9, 2025. The company introduced Gaia, a cutting-edge modular sofa, setting a new standard in modern living. Gaia, part of Cozey's expansive range of inventive products, offers a fresh take on traditional furniture with its forward-thinking design.
news.headline: Cozey launches Gaia sofa, a modular design setting new standards in furniture. Brand known for innovation.

news.summary: The community is invited to participate in a ribbon-cutting event on Wednesday, April 23rd in PARK MESA HEIGHTS, Calif. Vallarta Supermarkets, a prominent Latino-owned grocery chain in California, is excited to announce the launch of their new location. The supermarket's grand opening is set to take place on April 9, 2025, with festivities marking the occasion. This marks a significant step for Vallarta Supermarkets as they continue to expand their presence, providing a wide range of products and services to customers.Residents in the area can look forward to the convenience and amenities offered by the new supermarket branch. The event is expected to draw a large crowd, highlighting the community's support for this new business venture.
news.headline: Vallarta Supermarkets debuts new location on Slauson in Park Mesa Heights with ribbon-cutting ceremony on April 23rd.

news.summary: Exciting news for Mobile, AL as America's top indoor pickleball club franchise, PickleRage, is celebrating the grand opening of its latest facility in the city. The new PickleRage at Mobile, situated at 314..., will bring top-notch pickleball amenities to the area. With a set date of April 9, 2025, the club is gearing up to welcome enthusiasts in Mobile. Make sure to mark your calendars for the big event!

news.summary: An NBA veteran with eight All-Star appearances will conclude his professional basketball career with the Los Angeles Riot starting from June 14, 2025. The announcement was made on April 9, 2025, through a release by BIG3. Dwight Howard, who has had a successful career, will be joining the team for his final season.
news.headline: BIG3 signs NBA champion Dwight Howard for 2025 season with Los Angeles Riot, joining on June 14, 2025 for his final pro basketball season.

news.summary: It is crucial to carefully consider charges and thoroughly review your car insurance policy, as emphasized in a recent report from Los Angeles dated April 9, 2025. Despite a decrease in consumer interest, a significant number of electric vehicles (EVs) are continuously being sold across the country, particularly to new drivers. With summer approaching quickly, millions of EV sales are recorded nationwide, highlighting the continued popularity and demand for these vehicles.
news.headline: EV adoption slowing but millions still being sold nationwide. Tips on road-tripping in EV: plan charges, review insurance.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Houston, Right Choice Construction, a fast-expanding commercial general contractor owned by a woman, announced the launch of a new division called Right Choice Maintenance. This branch aims to offer reliable and efficient maintenance services to businesses throughout the Greater Houston area. The company's decision to expand its services comes as it continues to grow and meet the demands of the market.
news.headline: Houston's Right Choice Construction expands with new division - Right Choice Maintenance. Growing woman-owned company serving Greater Houston area.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in San Diego, Pearson (FTSE: PSON.L) and Pearson VUE, a top player in computer-based testing, unveiled their latest report, the Value of IT Certification Candidate Report. This ninth edition in the series offers essential insights into the IT certification landscape.
news.headline: Pearson releases 2025 IT Certification Candidate Report, 9th in series, offers valuable insights for success in AI era.

news.summary: In a recent move to support government attorneys affected by federal layoffs, Lawline, the top Continuing Legal Education (CLE) platform in the country, has unveiled a new initiative. The company revealed its plan to offer assistance to those facing job turmoil due to workforce reductions. This endeavor aims to aid attorneys navigating career disruptions by providing crucial resources and guidance.
news.headline: Lawline offers free one-year CLE access to federal lawyers affected by layoffs. Important date: April 9, 2025.

news.summary: AuditBoard, a cloud-based platform revolutionizing audit, risk, ESG, and InfoSec management, has been recognized as a leader in eight categories in the G2.com spring report. The platform, based in Los Angeles, received this distinction on April 9, 2025.
news.headline: AuditBoard has been a leader for over five years, topping eight categories in G2.com's spring report. Los Angeles, April 9, 2025.

news.summary: The latest enhancements to Fabric Virtual Care provide health systems, payers, employers, and digital health firms with the tools they need to stay competitive in meeting the increasing demands of consumers. These updates introduce various new features, such as subscription-based care, integrated lab testing, and seamless EMR integration. By offering these capabilities, these entities can better position themselves against the challenges posed by technology and retail competitors.
news.headline: Fabric launches Concierge Virtual Care with subscriptions, labs, and integrated experiences to compete in the healthcare industry.

news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio on April 9, 2025, the popular fashion and lifestyle brand for tween girls, Justice, revealed a thrilling collaboration with Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc. The partnership will introduce a PAC-MAN collection, timed perfectly for the upcoming summer season. This limited-edition collaboration is set to bring an exciting blend of fashion and gaming to fans, signaling a unique offering from Justice and Bandai Namco Entertainment America Inc.
news.headline: Justice collaborates with Bandai Namco for PAC-MAN collection to celebrate 45th anniversary, launching for summer.

news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on April 9, 2025, a significant development is occurring within the office furniture sector as lifetime limited warranties are emerging as the industry norm. Madison Liquidators is leading this transition, offering enhanced assurance to customers. This shift signifies a substantial change in the industry, reflecting an increased focus on long-term customer satisfaction.
news.headline: Madison Liquidators offers lifetime limited warranties to customers, setting a new industry standard for office furniture.

news.summary: A resident from Antioch, Tenn., shared the inspiration behind creating the WALL MOUNT WAX WARMER as a safer alternative for homes. The inventor highlighted the need to prevent accidents involving children and pets with hot wax. The product aims to address safety concerns and provides a secure way to enjoy wax warmers without risking burns or injuries. The innovative design offers a solution for households with curious individuals and ensures a worry-free experience.
news.headline: Inventor from Antioch, TN creates safer wall mount wax warmer to prevent accidents.

news.summary: An alarming number of new COVID-19 cases have been reported globally, with over 2.5 million confirmed cases and more than 160,000 deaths. In the United States alone, there have been over 800,000 confirmed cases and approximately 45,000 deaths. The situation remains critical as countries continue to struggle with the impact of the pandemic. Authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and measures to help flatten the curve and reduce the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Walmart's online operations set to be profitable this year, as reported by Bloomberg.

news.summary: In New York on April 9, 2025, L'Oréal Paris introduced its initiative "Never Your Fault" as part of the Stand Up against street harassment training program in conjunction with international anti-street harassment week. This campaign aims to address misconceptions surrounding street harassment, a prevalent issue globally.
news.headline: L'Oréal Paris launches "Street Harassment is Never Your Fault" campaign for Stand Up training program amid global support.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the global economy is projected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, marking a significant increase from the previous forecast of 4.2%. This growth is driven by a stronger-than-expected rebound in major economies such as the United States, China, and the Eurozone. The United States is expected to see a growth of 6.9% this year, while China is forecasted to grow by 8.5% and the Eurozone by 4.3%. However, the recovery is not evenly distributed, with emerging market and developing economies facing challenges such as vaccine access and limited policy space. Inflation is also a concern, with global consumer prices rising by 3.8% in 2021, the highest level in a decade. Despite these challenges, the global economy is on track for a robust recovery this year.
news.headline: Amazon cuts China inventory orders due to tariffs affecting AMZN.

Ripple acquired Hidden Road for $1.25 billion. The Justice Dept. dissolved its crypto-focused unit. NY proposed blockchain for election use. Mastercard and Kraken are collaborating for European payments. BitGo integrated Lightning Network. BlackRock appointed Anchorage Digital as custodian. SOL launched Confidential Balances extensions. WLFI distributed stablecoin to holders and sold $8m ETH at a $125m loss. B2C2 planned to buy a stake in SBI Holdings for $100m. Ledger will support SUI soon. FOMO HOUR covers daily news and events in the crypto and macro spheres, hosted by Farokh, Mando, and Tyler. Live streaming Monday to Friday on YouTube and X. #bitcoin #crypto #podcast.

DOJ disbands crypto unit, NY considers blockchain for elections. Mastercard, Kraken collaborate in Europe. BlackRock partners with Anchorage. BitGo integrates Lightning Network. news.summary: A recent report on the construction industry in Greece has revealed promising growth projections. The market is anticipated to see a 4.5% annual increase, reaching a value of EUR 4.37 billion. The report covers over 40 market segments including residential, commercial, industrial, institutional, and infrastructure construction. It also provides insights into city-level construction values and construction cost structures. This update, effective Q1 2025, is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for those interested in further details on the market trends and forecasts.
news.headline: "Greece's construction industry to grow by 4.5% annually, reaching EUR 4.37 billion by 2025 - ResearchAndMarkets.com"
